channel.title: Artificial Intelligence on Field Manual
channel.description: Recent content in Artificial Intelligence on Field Manual

item.title: MCP
item.description:
Model Context Protocol #

Generally, I try to learn how something works before using it. However, in the case of MCP, I used it and enjoyed the benefits of it before I thought that I should start learning about it.

Specifically, I have used the GitHub MCP and the Atlassian Confluence one, which has been great for reviewing code and updating docs.

This page will document my learnings about MCP.
